GHSA-4C4X-JM2X-PF9J.60ef2bceba192c5bf9327d003bceea8bf1f8275f:
Drop support for fetching public keys by URL in the search index (#2731)

This mitigates blind SSRF. Note that this API was marked as experimental
so while this is a breaking change to the API, we offered no guarantee
of stability.

Fixes GHSA-4c4x-jm2x-pf9j

Signed-off-by: Hayden <8418760+Hayden-IO@users.noreply.github.com>

GHSA-273P-M2CW-6833.39bae3d192bce48ef4ef2cbd1788fb5770fee8cd:
Merge commit from fork (#2729)

This adds graceful handling of dereferencing a number of pointers where
the content may be user-controlled.

Also took care of a few spelling errors too.

Fixes GHSA-273p-m2cw-6833

Signed-off-by: Hayden <8418760+Hayden-IO@users.noreply.github.com>
